EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface INetworkGlobalTurnDelayCategory

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that specify the turn delay for a specified category of global turns.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("A67BF724-A607-4820-B8E4-7017A398066C")]
public interface INetworkGlobalTurnDelayCategory

Properties

AngleCategory

The turn angle category (straight, reverse, right, or left) of turns in this turn delay category.

esriNetworkTurnAngleCategory AngleCategory { get; }

Property Value

esriNetworkTurnAngleCategory

Examples

Sample Snippet

CrossRoadCategory

The road category of the most major cross road of turns in this turn delay category.

esriNetworkRoadCategory CrossRoadCategory { get; }

Property Value

esriNetworkRoadCategory

Examples

Sample Snippet

FromRoadCategory

The road category of the from road of turns in this turn delay category.

esriNetworkRoadCategory FromRoadCategory { get; }

Property Value

esriNetworkRoadCategory

Examples

Sample Snippet

Seconds

The expected traversal time in seconds of turns associated with this turn delay category (matching angle, from road, to road, and cross road categories).

double Seconds { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

ToRoadCategory

The road category of the to road of turns in this turn delay category.

esriNetworkRoadCategory ToRoadCategory { get; }

Property Value

esriNetworkRoadCategory

Examples

Sample Snippet

Methods

Initialize(double, esriNetworkTurnAngleCategory, esriNetworkRoadCategory, esriNetworkRoadCategory, esriNetworkRoadCategory)

Initializes the seconds and specifies the referenced category of global turns.

void Initialize(double Seconds, esriNetworkTurnAngleCategory AngleCategory, esriNetworkRoadCategory FromRoadCategory, esriNetworkRoadCategory ToRoadCategory, esriNetworkRoadCategory CrossRoadCategory)

Parameters

Seconds double
AngleCategory esriNetworkTurnAngleCategory
FromRoadCategory esriNetworkRoadCategory
ToRoadCategory esriNetworkRoadCategory
CrossRoadCategory esriNetworkRoadCategory
